searchKeywords: agent OR orchestration OR repo OR framework OR automation
filteringDirectives: Focus on high-signal AI technical updates and innovations that a curious non-developer can still understand and act on. Prioritize: new open-source repos, frameworks, tools, or agent patterns; memory management techniques (persistent memory, context windows, KV cache, long-term recall, etc.); architecture innovations; efficiency breakthroughs; practical benchmarks; and clear expert explanations of new capabilities or 'why this matters'. Include thoughtful commentary that explains implications. Maximum 6 items per section. If nothing is truly high-signal, put the next-best relevant posts in near_misses with a reason.
